title: alnus glutinosa f. incisa
intro: Alnus glutinosa f. incisa, also known as cut-leaved alder, is a foliage plant that belongs to the alder family and is characterized by its cut or incised leaves. The medicinal properties of Alnus glutinosa f. incisa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Alnus glutinosa f. incisa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
